14_exactly_10_agentcore_memory_tools.note: tools/list enumerates exactly the 10 stable names from PROJECT_ANCHOR §5

bifrost_upstream_caveats: serena: known-disconnected (PROJECT_ANCHOR and ops/bifrost/evidence); tools appear in tools/list but call timeouts expected

agentcore_memory: repeatedly disconnects and reconnects during validation window; both memory_status and startup_context consistently timeout at 2m tool-execution cap. Out of scope for this client-local enrollment.
native_validation_blocker: agentcore_memory upstream degraded + mcp__* tool functions not exposed to the running agent (MiniMax Code product limitation). Native lifecycle must be re-run in a fresh MiniMax Code chat after the global rules reload and after the agentcore_memory upstream is healthy.
roll_forward_path: Operator opens a new chat in a registered non-Swarm test project (e.g. D:\github\agentcore-control-plane)
Agent runs project_activate -> session_open -> startup_context -> append_event (idempotency) -> retrieve_context -> expand_source -> build_handoff -> session_close; resume; isolation
Once all 14 lifecycle steps pass with evidence, promote enrollment_status to live_validated and update ide-profiles/minimax/IDE_PROFILE.yaml last_validation_date to that date
